codeReview.summary: The complete-flow-testing feature delivers E2E tests covering VAL-CROSS-001 (complete registration → onboarding → session → history flow) and VAL-CROSS-003 (settings change → verify in session). Both assertions passed in user-testing validation. Tests are implemented in e2e/cross-flows-comprehensive.spec.ts, e2e/cross-flow-smoke.spec.ts, e2e/full-journey.spec.ts, and backend-python/tests/test_complete_flows.py. The test suite is well-organized with clear JSDoc documentation, proper beforeEach/afterEach cleanup, and role-based selectors. Backend tests provide API-level coverage with mocked LLM. E2E tests verify UI flows with appropriate timeouts and error handling for streaming.

issues.description: VAL-CROSS-003 test in cross-flow-smoke.spec.ts tests 'Edit profile preserves data after navigation' rather than 'Settings change → verify in session' as described in validation contract. However, cross-flows-comprehensive.spec.ts does contain proper TTS settings tests for VAL-CROSS-003.

Test ends session without waiting for Marcus's AI response to complete ('Don't wait for full Marcus response - streaming may not complete'). This is pragmatic due to Ollama timing issues but means full AI integration isn't exercised in E2E test. Backend tests in test_complete_flows.py cover AI responses with mocked LLM.
Multiple instances of page.waitForTimeout(2000) instead of proper Playwright waits. These hardcoded sleeps could cause flakiness but are acceptable for handling streaming timing.
VAL-CROSS-005 test has manual dialog opening via page.evaluate() which may be fragile. The dialog should be opened through normal user interactions.

sharedStateObservations.observation: E2E tests use localhost:3100/3101 hardcoded URLs instead of reading from environment or playwright config. The AGENTS.md specifies port range 3100-3199 but doesn't document this convention for tests.
Backend tests use synchronous TestClient but skill.md shows async examples with AsyncClient. Both approaches work but consistency could be improved.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: test_complete_flows.py uses TestClient (sync), skill.md shows AsyncClient (async)

sharedStateObservations.observation: The e2e-worker skill specifies tests should be in backend-python/tests/ but actual Playwright E2E tests are in /e2e/ directory. The skill procedure doesn't match actual project structure.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill says tests at backend-python/tests/, actual E2E tests at e2e/*.spec.ts

summary: The complete-flow-testing feature provides comprehensive E2E test coverage for VAL-CROSS-001 and VAL-CROSS-003 assertions. Both assertions passed in user-testing validation (per cross-flows synthesis). The test suite is well-structured with clear documentation, proper isolation between tests, and appropriate error handling. No blocking issues found. Non-blocking improvements noted include: standardizing VAL-CROSS-003 test naming, potentially replacing hardcoded sleeps with proper waits, and updating the skill.md to reflect actual test file locations.
